# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-tcp
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - frontend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-sa
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - backend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: database-sa
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - database.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-frontend-to-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: frontend-sa
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-backend-to-database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: database-tcp
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: backend-sa
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-prometheus-to-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: frontend-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: backend-sa
